---
title: "Mary Louisa Ridding"
---

## Mary Louisa Ridding

**Dates:** (28 March 1838-1859)

**Maiden name:** (Moberly)

### Description

second daughter of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly

### Biography

She married (1858) the Rev. George Ridding and died a year later. [<i>Dulce Domum</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from [Summer 1864][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from June 1855.
- Letter from June 1854.
- Letter from [late 1853?]
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
